name: worksync
description: - `/client` - Next.js React frontend with folders for app/, components/, hooks/, services/, types/, and lib/. - /server - Express backend with folders for routes/, controllers/, middlewares/, services/, utils/, and config/. - /ai - LLM config folder with prompts/ (system prompt .txt files), schemas/ (JSON output schemas for triage, entity extraction), and ollama-config.js. - /supabase - Contains migrations/ folder with .sql files (employees, tickets, departments, chat_logs) and seed.sql for dummy data. - .env.example - Example environment variables configuration for backend/frontend parameters. - README.md - Documentation and instructions. - .gitignore - Ignored files for git version control. - docker-compose.yml - Docker Compose file to orchestrate local Ollama.
